stemHtml: What are the latitudes and tracks in the North Atlantic Ocean where tropical revolving storms move as they develop and mature?

options.a: 5ºN to 10ºN moving from west to east, generally turning to the Northeast.
options.b: 20ºN to 25ºN moving from west to east, turning into south-east direction.
options.c: 10ºN to 15ºN moving from east to west, generally turning to Northerly directions.
options.d: 10ºN to 15ºN moving from west to east, generally turning to Northeast directions.
